ddls:
CREATE TABLE "indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each index */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the index */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the index */,
  "index_type" TEXT /* Type of index (e.g., equity, bond, commodity) */,
  "base_value" REAL /* Base value of the index */,
  "base_date" TEXT /* Base date of the index */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the index data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "index_funds" (
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each index fund */,
  "fund_name" TEXT /* Name of the index fund */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the index fund */,
  "fund_type" TEXT /* Type of fund (e.g., ETF, mutual fund) */,
  "expense_ratio" REAL /* Expense ratio of the fund */,
  "inception_date" TEXT /* Date the fund was launched */,
  "asset_under_management" REAL /* Total assets under management in the fund */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the fund data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fund_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, portfolio manager, investor) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to (e.g., finance, IT, HR) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the data */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the user's session */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "index_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial index */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the performance entry */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the index on the given date */,
  "change" REAL /* Change in value from the previous date */,
  "percent_change" REAL /* Percent change in value from the previous date */,
  "high_value" REAL /* Highest value of the index on the given date */,
  "low_value" REAL /* Lowest value of the index on the given date */,
  "volume" REAL /* Trading volume of the index on the given date */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source from which the data was obtained */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* A score indicating the reliability or quality of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_index_performance_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_index_performance_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES indices ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fund_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* ID of the index fund */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the performance entry */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the fund on the given date */,
  "change" REAL /* Change in value from the previous date */,
  "percent_change" REAL /* Percent change in value from the previous date */,
  "high_value" REAL /* Highest value of the fund on the given date */,
  "low_value" REAL /* Lowest value of the fund on the given date */,
  "volume" REAL /* Trading volume of the fund on the given date */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source from which the data was obtained */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* A score indicating the reliability or quality of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fund_performance_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fund_performance_fund_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_id") REFERENCES index_funds ("fund_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL for the data source */,
  "api_endpoint" TEXT /* API endpoint for data retrieval */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key required for data retrieval */,
  "last_sync_date" TEXT /* Date of the last data synchronization */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data source (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_source_connections" (
  "connection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source connection */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial data entry */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "last_sync_date" TEXT /* Date of the last data synchronization */,
  "sync_status" TEXT /* Status of the last data synchronization (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "sync_message" TEXT /* Message or error code from the last data synchronization */,
  "last_sync_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the last data synchronization in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("connection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_connections_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)
